summary:
Claim: Lidocaine is preferred in dentistry due to reduced allergy risk.  
Evidence: - Lidocaine (amide) metabolizes safely without producing allergenic byproducts. - Procaine (ester) forms metabolites similar to penicillin, increasing allergy risk.  
Answer: C

I agree with the prior conclusion. Lidocaine has a significantly lower incidence of allergic reactions than procaine because it is an amide agent that generates non-allergenic metabolites, unlike ester-based agents such as procaine which form reactive, immunogenic byproducts.  
Answer: C
